markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to review and refine content strategy for Gitpod's SEO-focused content marketing engagement with fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content clusters generally align with Gitpod's goals, with some refinements needed (e.g. expand dev environment setup topics, de-prioritize CI/CD/DevOps)](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Process will involve iterative feedback on calibration articles to dial in tone/style before scaling up content production](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [fwd.digital to suggest initial calibration article topics; Gitpod to provide analytics access for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Strategy developed based on keyword research, competitor gap analysis, and Gitpod's stated content goals](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Focused on productivity, solution awareness, and real problem-solving vs. infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Content opportunities structured across funnel stages, with room to expand topics](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Content Clusters Review

  - [AI, productivity metrics, onboarding, and security/compliance clusters align well with Gitpod's focus](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [DevOps/CI/CD topics less of a priority - may be oversaturated, less directly relevant](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Productivity tools and programming language clusters could be expanded to include more dev environment setup topics](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Opportunity to create content around common developer pain points (e.g. new laptop setup, dependency installation)](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [fwd.digital uses AirOps tool to semi-automate article generation](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Process involves multiple steps: keyword/context input, research, outline generation, writing, post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Human oversight and iteration at key points to refine outputs](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Gitpod feedback incorporated into style guide to continually improve relevance/quality](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to suggest 2 calibration articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Gitpod to provide analytics access to fwd.digital team](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)
  - [Gitpod to review/add to tone of voice/style guide document](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=2048.0)
  - [fwd.digital to refine content clusters based on meeting feedback](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to review calibration articles and refine process](https://fathom.video/share/uPwcUQehPRHyj_htYk1xsjUGMbMkyp3d?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
